Button.TooltipReference: Press to choose your character's appearance
Press to have a random name chosen for you
When checked, you will begin your journey in the EQ Legends Tutorial zone.
Select for the one-time creation of a fully equipped level 51 character with 50 AA points.

Combobox.TooltipReference: Select which level of Heroic Character upgrade to use.

Button.TooltipReference: Select for the creation of a fully equipped Heroic Character.
